title: For the Love of Updates
description: A mod that adds simple revamps to minecraft with each new version of the mod
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0985ff5e7c1b2c1dd55c71666f710ceda939f0a8.png)

---

**For the love of updates is a mod that adds new things to the game with every new mod version, similar to Minecraft updates!** (smaller additions to the mod will be snapshot releases)
each "update" will revolve around a specific theme and will add or change new things **such as**
- New mobs
  
- New Foods
  
- Terrain Generation
  
- New Structures
  
- New Items and Armors
  
- Player Animations
  
- New Music



---


**CURRENT SNAPSHOT : Fabulous Foliage**

(DISCLAIMER: If the shader you use with this mod doesnt allow for transparent particles, the fog particles will show up as solid and heavily block your view)

![new foliage](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1504/509/2026-01-30_13-14-13-png.png) ![dandelion being blown](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1504/508/2026-01-30_13-16-12-png.png) ![alt text](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1504/514/2026-01-30_13-18-50-jpg.jpg)


(images showcase the new river reeds, grapes, white dandelion, and 3 tropical jungle plants, Dandelion blow particles, and leaf and branch particles that fall from the sky when in forest type biomes)

---


Here is a list of all currently planned "updates" and "snapshots" and what they will add (this is just the gist of everything, there WILL be more than just what is listed below)


1. Otherworldly Overhaul | Adds new biomes and mobs to both the end and the nether, and also slightly changes the look of the ender dragon. Examples : The Riftlands end biome with shattered stars in the sky, the endworm that hunts enderman, HeatFelids nether biome with lava lakes, and the fire gecko that will eat small magma cubes.
